item.title: The Disappearance of Young Adult Books and Services in Public Libraries: Book Censorship News, February 20, 2026
item.description: Teen collections in public libraries are disappearing. So, too, are professionals dedicated to serving this demographic.

item.title: Unsettle Down: 8 Creepy Post-Apocalyptic Novels
item.description: What post-apocalyptic novel gives you the creep?

item.title: The Most Read Books on Goodreads This Week
item.description: Here are the most read books on Goodreads this week! These are the buzziest books of the moment, from Wuthering Heights to The Housemaid.

item.title: Buzzy New Releases and More Library Updates
item.description: Buzz worthy new books and a whole host of excellent book news you'll want to know about.

item.title: The Silliest Peanuts Tribute You’ve Never Heard Of
item.description: We love a good Peanuts tribute, and this might be one of the most unexpected and silly.
